AMZN.reasoning: TREND ASSESSMENT: Daily EMA alignment is unambiguously bullish — EMA10 (252.99) > EMA21 (241.97) > EMA50 (230.28) — fanning cleanly with price at 259.70 above all moving averages. ADX at 61.85 with Plus DI (50.62) dwarfing Minus DI (12.33) confirms an extremely strong established uptrend. Price has made higher highs (recent high 264.50) and is holding above all key EMAs. Wiki context corroborates: prior run (Apr 17) had ADX at 44 in confirmed uptrend, which has since strengthened further to 62. MOMENTUM ASSESSMENT: Daily ROC is all positive — 5d (+3.92%), 10d (+4.29%), 21d (+30.28%) — a strong, broad-based momentum signature. Daily MACD line (12.21) is above signal (10.41) with a positive histogram (+1.81), supporting momentum continuation. However, MOMENTUM IS NOT CLEARLY ACCELERATING at the short-term level: daily RSI 14d at 86.14 and 21d at 89.35 are at extreme overbought readings that historically precede at least short-term pauses. HOURLY DIVERGENCE (WARNING): The hourly timeframe is flashing meaningful caution signs — hourly MACD histogram is negative (-0.48), hourly ADX at 20.06 is sub-25 with Minus DI (27.61) > Plus DI (18.37), hourly OBV is diverging bearishly from price, and a bearish RSI divergence is detected on the hourly. This confirms the stock is in an active short-term pullback/consolidation, currently sitting ~1.8% below the recent high of 264.50. The hourly conflict with the daily trend means the ideal entry has NOT yet arrived. ENTRY LOGIC: Per strategy rules, entry is on a pullback to the 10 or 21 EMA. Price is currently 2.65% above EMA10 (~253.00) — not yet at the EMA. The ongoing pullback from 264.50 needs to complete with price retesting the 10 EMA zone (252-255) and hourly momentum stabilizing. At that point the setup becomes high-quality. RISK: The z-score of 2.0 (daily, vs 2.84 in prior wiki run) signals statistical extension. Macro regime is described as transitional/fragile. Confidence is moderated to 62 to reflect the strong daily trend versus active short-term weakness and overextension. Signal is bullish (not neutral) because the trend and daily momentum are genuinely strong — this is a trend continuation setup, just not at the ideal entry yet.
